message:
refactor(mux): simplify HTTP helpers, tmux key handling, and add tests

- Unify httpPost/httpGetWithAuth into single httpFetch with opts struct
- Replace 22-line isWebSocketUpgrade with 3-line extractHeader call
- Move login page <body> tag split to comptime constants
- Simplify extractFormValue to avoid bufPrint allocations
- Extract parseOAuthBlock helper to deduplicate OAuth credential parsing
- Replace tmux key array + linear scan with StaticStringMap (O(1) lookup)
- Extract jsonFindValue shared helper for JSON parsing
- Fix tmux send-keys: use ghostty_surface_key for special keys to bypass
  bracketed paste mode (Enter, Tab, etc. now execute properly)
- Rewrite tmux shim send-keys to build JSON array preserving arg boundaries
- Add 23 tests covering HTTP helpers, JSON parsing, tmux key lookup
